description_long: This ornate ceiling-mounted sconce features a central stem with elaborate detailing and six gracefully curved arms radiating outward. Each arm supports a lampshade, likely made of frosted or tinted glass, which softens the light and adds a touch of elegance. The arms and central structure appear to be crafted from a glossy, possibly metallic or ceramic material, finished in a light color. Decorative flourishes and subtle scrollwork are visible on the arms and stem, enhancing its classic, vintage appeal. The fixture is designed to hang from the ceiling, making it suitable for upscale urban interiors or covered outdoor spaces. The overall design is symmetrical, with each lampshade evenly spaced around the central axis.
description: A decorative, vintage-style ceiling sconce with six glass-shaded arms and ornate detailing, finished in a light color. The symmetrical design and classic motifs evoke elegance and sophistication.
description_view_0: Front view showing all six arms and lampshades symmetrically arranged around the central stem.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing the curvature of the arms and the depth of the lampshades.
description_view_2: Another rotated view, similar to view 0, with the arms and shades evenly spaced and the central stem visible.
description_view_3: View from the opposite side, maintaining symmetry and showing the same ornate detailing as the front.
attribute_fixture_design: Vintage and ornate, with classical scrollwork and symmetrical arms, evoking a sense of old-world elegance and sophistication.
